appversion_lifecycle.description: Defines the lifecycle policies for managing application versions, including optional deletion of the source from S3, maximum age in days, maximum count, and a required IAM service role.

description.description: Provides a detailed explanation or metadata about the resource being defined, typically used for documentation or identification purposes.

name.description: Specifies the required name of the resource, which must be unique and is used to identify it within the system.

tags.description: Defines key-value pairs for custom metadata to categorize or organize the resource, allowing for optional tagging.
